reviews.review_title: A bit expensive but a amazing games
reviews.review_description: This game is amazing it is so much more satisfying to play than normal Tetris I've been Really into it it has so much content in it but at the end of the day it is still just Tetris it could have been 20$ still amazing game.
I’ve never had this much fun with Tetris. The VR visuals are insanely immersive — you really feel inside the game. Everything flows together so well, it’s hard to stop playing.
The game should cost 10% of what is now.

First things, I'm not a Tetris fan.  I do like these types of puzzle games but from the Gameboy days through to now I never took to Tetris.  This is different though.  I started playing and thought great, Tetris hovering in the air but worse looking.  As I played though I started noticing musical integration with the button presses and it just makes it better that moves add to the musical effect.  If it doesn't it certainly gives the illusion it does.  Maybe that's how it got it's name.  I don't know but I really enjoy it.
Most satisfying game ice ever played, classic tetris feel with soul numbing visuals and music that feels like composing art and music that is hypnoticly satisfying, Bravo... Bravo...

WOW! This is the version of Tetris that'll introduce a new era of fans. They've given it a modern twist with an arty, musical element which is beautifully done. It's a joy to play and makes you want to progress to the next stage just to experience another spectacle.

Overall, great job guys!!

reviews.review_title: Great way to play a GOAT video game
reviews.review_description: Tetris Effect doesn’t fundamentally change the way you play Tetris. Rather it enhances “The Zone” state and allows you to more thoroughly escape reality with dreamy visuals and superbly synced music and sound effects.

i don't even play Tetris. I thought this game would be bad coz i don't like Tetris. BUT i got it in meta+ and i was like




















































































OOOOOOHHHH MY GAH TJIS IX AMAXINH ANS J ANDOIFVJ FKFFJSDJIKFRJVJDNJJUCJNJJSNDJINDCAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA.



And there u go.

In Journey Mode, the Tetriminos are often too faint and transparent to see clearly on certain stages. They blend into the background, making it very difficult to play. I wish the pieces were more solid and easier to distinguish from the effects.

who knew a tetris game could have such an amazing ost
this game is obviously the best tetris game that i've ever played
the different modes, the scenery, the 3v1, it's truly beautiful
thank you enhance
A much different type of tetris. Give us the original
Lost my save for not watching end credits

developer_response.body: Please contact our support—we'd like to investigate this issue! https://enhance-experience.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/requests/new

reviews.review_description: This is an amazing game. Journey mode from start to finish is a must have experience. Just wow.
The graphics are lovely. The music is good. The last puzzle in Journey Mode is unwinnable. I didn't sign up for a rage game 😕

You know those people on Reddit that take an absurd amount of Pepto-Bismol and trip out of their minds?
Yeah, take that, and slap Tetris onto it.
This is quite literally the greatest way to play Tetris. The music is catchy, the scenes are creative, and the game is genuinely challenging at times.
It’s honestly pretty hard to describe. Just play it for yourself, man.
This is an excellent example of what a good VR game is. Graphics, music, and atmosphere is amazing 👏

I really enjoy playing Tetris Effect Connected, but it’s honestly frustrating that when I use a DualSense on the Meta Quest 3, there’s no native vibration support. I personally don’t like playing with the Quest 3’s original controllers for this game, because I find the DualSense much more comfortable and precise. But it’s really disappointing that I can’t get any haptic feedback at all.

Please consider adding native vibration support for the DualSense controller on the Quest 3 version. It would make the experience so much better for those of us who prefer using that controller. Thanks a lot!

Overall I enjoy the game but game play would be much better if the location settings were accurate. I find the ranked matches are quiet and I don't get matched with anyone from my time zone because the location is way off no matter where I select on the map. I've ever cleared the cache of the game and still nothing changes.

The game is also glitchy. When selecting ranked games I'm sometimes left on the searching screen before having to force a restart of the game.

Not enough levels either. If the ranked matches were better there would be longer game play for me.

This game is pure art, with the developers using Tetris as their medium. I’ve been playing Tetris since it first came out on the GameBoy, it was the only game I had, so I like to think of myself as a bit of a pro. ;-)

What really stands out here is the way it blends the classic gameplay with stunning visuals and a truly unique atmosphere. The VR experience takes it to another level: you’re completely immersed, and it’s one of the few VR games you can just sit back with and enjoy without hassle.

I keep coming back to this game over and over again. If you love Tetris even a little, this is an absolute must-have.

I would go so far as to say I had genuine disdain for Tetris on the Gameboy, I was Super Mario all day, but this....THIS, is unbelievable!!
Maybe now I'm a boomer I prefer this kind of thing, who knows, but the work they've put into this is just stunning, it totally transports you to a different place, exactly what VR is all about, and captivates you.

How they've managed it with what is essentially the same game is nothing short of spectacular, an easy 5 stars from me

This may be the same Tetris we know and love from our childhood, however this is the most visually stunning, well designed version I’ve ever played! The game builds up during play progressively getting more visually and musically impressive as the levels increase. I found myself continually saying “wow” throughout and even caught myself bobbing to the beats. Would HIGHLY RECOMMEND! By far my favorite VR game so far!!

As someone who jumped into VR for the first time, this game being present was a godsend. Because I already knew how to play Tetris, and put in a bunch of time on Re:Connected on console, I already knew a lot of the nuances of this game... and in VR, it doesn't disappoint!! Only thing I wish would happen is this version gets the Reconnected update we got on PC/Console a couple years back.

developer_response.body: But it does have all the content from the Connected version!

reviews.review_description: Until I played it in vr. The soundtrack to this game is mindblowing. I could have never predicted that I would sit for hours playing Tetris campaign. One of my favorite vr games for sure. Please update it so I can continue my new addiction 👍

It is EVERYTHING I ever dreamed it would be! I have looked at reviews from YouTube, read reviews and comments in social media threads and opinions from all over. 

I couldn’t decide if it was going to be an amazing experience or a waste of money? So I broke down and downloaded it while it was on sale. 

I can’t say enough, no matter if you are new or a retro Tetris gamer. This remake of Tetris is a euphoric experience. 

Between the 360 degree graphic particles floating around you and the music changing at every movement, this game will blow your mind. 

Do not miss out.
It's fun to play and I love the different backgrounds and sounds

I have 80 different apps on the quest and this is my favorite. The synesthesia effect is extraordinary. It gets very difficult but that's part of the fun. The music and visuals 10/10. This is how tetris was meant to be played.

It starts with an unnecessarily complicated main menu and a rather odd way of presenting options. The music choice is super annoying, and the sound effects are poorly implemented and modulated during gameplay. You’re surrounded by distracting particle effects and random creatures that don’t seem to relate to the game at all. The playfield itself just hovers flat in midair, which feels like a missed opportunity to truly bring Tetris into the VR space and make full use of the technology.

This game is great and so fun I expected to play this game for 5 seconds and never play again but no I didn’t. The levels are so beautiful and It is so satisfying to get a Tetris and there are so many modes 10 effect modes 6 multiplayer modes and 30 campaign levels and a f you like classic Tetris there is a classic Tetris effect mode that follows all the rules of classic Tetris and looks like classic Tetris. best game ever 10/10 would recommend
It's such a great way to play the game. I love the music real trance feel to it. It keeps me coming back for more. I could spend hours playing this game keeps me relaxed 😌.

There’s only a few games that have entered my top of all time games. This is now one of them. I was skeptical how Tetris a game about blocks could leave you wanting more. This isn’t Minecraft, it has one goal, to clear lines, that’s it. How could a game like this make you feel like you went through an experience, a moment, well it did. From the dynamic music to the lights and beautiful animations all going on around you to a classic dancing of the blocks where each mini journey takes you to a crescendo. Thank you for this awesomeness

reviews.review_title: Love it, happy I got it half price
reviews.review_description: This game was on my wishlist for a year before I finally decided to get it. Super relaxing, awesome music and effects. I’ve been playing daily. Great for anxiety. There are several levels of difficulty and the lowest (“practice”) is super easy and there’s no game over, so ignore the comments saying that it’s too difficult. To be clear: I LOVE this game. However, it is kind of expensive for what it is. Maybe this has to do with producing the cool music… I don’t know. I bought it half price and I’m happy that I did. If add-ons come along, I’ll be buying them. Edit 2025: We need a remake of this game with better graphics and environments. A trippier new version. This game is one of my most played. Never gets old. Quest essential.

reviews.review_title: Awesome Game, but buy on Quest as resort
reviews.review_description:
I am attempting to use Tetris for CPTSD.  Tetris effect is the best version of the game available.  I own it on many devices.  Primarily I play using an Index and Steam VR on my PC, but I also play desktop even using a low spec laptop.  

All other platforms give good options including Nintendo Switch which is much more practical for portability than a Quest.  The game is good in VR and the scaled back visuals for Quest and Switch don't hurt the experience.  In fact they should offer a lighter version for low spec PC's imo.

If you own a gaming PC that can run the game I strongly encourage buying the game on Steam.  With native Steam VR the game plays better in VR because of low latency.  This may not hold up for using the Quest as a PCVR headset but desktop options should still make PC a better first choice for purchase.

I own on Epic, Steam, Switch (for my son) and now Quest for a better portable option for myself.  The game is great just choose your best platform or buy for multiple when it serves a purpose like it does for me.  If I only bought it once.  It would be on Steam.
Challenging and fun. 3d graphics are pleasant and enjoyable. The soundtrack is exceptional. Highly recommend!

This is one of my favorite games on vr it is such a beautiful and great game its so relaxing but also challenging 
One thing that is kind of hard to get used to tho is the controls there not what I expected and they are difficult to get used to but other than that its amazing
I absolutely love this game, the visuals and the music are perfect. I really really wish they would update the game with higher resolution for the more recent Quest models

I love Tetris since I bought the original Game Boy. Yes, I'm this old. The years since spawned several iterations on different platforms. One of the better ones was Tetris Party Deluxe on the Wii. Tetris Effect is sadly one of the weekest games in the series and a wasted opportunity since it does not harness the potential of VR. While playing, you are bombarded (read 'distracted') by annoying beats and flashing light shows. These 'effects' cannot be changed. Even the Game Boy version had 3 kinds of music to chose from.
Being released for VR, I honestly expected new play modes that made use of the third dimension. No luck here.
Addictive!
Bob

reviews.review_title: Not as impressive as people say
reviews.review_description: It's decent. The visuals get in the way of the tetris game, and in some instances alters shapes of blocks to look messy enough that it takes a while to know what the shape is. For instance, blocks shaped as circular gears. The music is okay, the visuals are pretty dated by 2024 standards. Which is to be expected for a game from a few years back, but the price is what one would expect for a new game. The menu looks dated even for the time it was released in. It should be updated and more fine tuned. It's tetris, and tetris is fun, though I don't think this implementation of it was great.

Thirty years later, one of the modern gaming classics returns to the VR format for what is an undeniable assault on the senses. This is one of the most breathtaking interactive entertainment experiences of all time.
Exactly as the title says...very beautifully done. I've grown to use this game as a means of emotional control.
Absolutely terrible game.
When you play all you think about is the next block and where it can fit. Then the pretty visuals bob and fluctuate every now and then...its very calming.

I remember old Tetris on a no color, no light Gameboy. It was a fun simple game. This was absolutely mind blowing. The graphics, the scenes, the music... It was so stunningly beautiful. I really enjoy the game so much. I'm also lucky to be alive to witness how far this OG of a game came. Good work!
fun!
On my meta quest 2 stuck on the photosensitivity warning. Won't register me pressing the A button, or any button for that matter. Waste of $30. Can I get a refund please?

developer_response.body: Please consider contacting our support and entering a ticket for your issue so we can help you resolve it. https://enhance-experience.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/requests/new

reviews.review_description: great music and effects, however from the second round I started to feel sick and cannot play it anymore  too bad

TETRIS is a gaming phenomenon that spans 4 decades of gaming across multiple platforms and will be played until the end of time. This current VR iteration has great visuals, great gameplay mechanics and controls; but there is one thing missing. The soundtrack lacks the classic TETRIS theme we have all grown to love, and this has soured the experience for me. There is a cheat that unlocks a special level that starts off like the original game using old school green boxes made from keyboard characters and even has the original creator saying things in Russian when you make a line. This eventually moves on in visuals and will start to play music similar to the theme, but it's just not right. I want to play TETRIS with the TETRIS theme blaring in the background. It just doesn't feel right when playing the game and there's relaxing dream music in Journey mode, or whatever music they composed for the other modes. Give me the awesome score from TETRIS 99. It's an okay TETRIS game, but I need the full TETRIS experience, and it just doesn't give it...
If you like tetris just buy it. If you dont like tetris buy it anyway!

reviews.review_title: A beautiful take on the original
reviews.review_description:
Tetris, being one of the oldest and biggest games of all time, had my hopes high for the VR version.

I got this using the Quest+ subscription, and I had never played Tetris before.
There was no tutorial, because it didn't need one. This was one of the most thrilling experiences I have had. The reaction I had was amazing,
I have never gotten this game to work. Just spins and never loads. Is there a trick or something?

developer_response.body: Please contact our support directly so that we can help you with this! https://enhance-experience.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/requests/new

reviews.review_description: I have seen one or two people point this out, it’s really important, but the controls lag pretty hard when the blocks speed up and there are a lot on the screen. Particularly it seems to move to the right drastically slower than to the left! I noticed if I flick the stick repeatedly it helps, but moving to the right is very glitchy when the game speeds up. That’s a really big deal if you’re actually playing the game seriously. I reduced the graphics effects as much as I could but I wish I could make it even more barebones or they would work harder to separate the input from the rendering.

developer_response.body: Try customizing the controller sensitivity. You'll find it in OPTIONS, Gameplay Options, and then scroll down toward the bottom of the list. You should be able to tune these to your liking.

reviews.review_title: it’s too fast can’t slow down
reviews.review_description: I use this more like a relaxation tool, love the music and amazing pictures. However, it gets super stressful when I can’t slow down the speed and can’t pass levels and really just stuck where I am. It defeats the purposes of getting this game to begin with. I got more stressful each time playing this! I hope the developers see this message and contact me so I can continue to love this game. Users should have control over how fast they want this game to be.

developer_response.body: Playing Journey mode in the Practice difficulty removes this speed-up and you can play at your own pace.

reviews.review_description: This application compares poorly to the original Tetris game.  Such a waste of money.

reviews.review_title: Discord crew Sold me & BANNED ME?
reviews.review_description:
UPDATE 2: it's been 6 months and not even a apology, nothing, it's like they are running their business like a bunch of social justice Marxists who don't think anybody deserves even an apology from them. These guys don't care about anybody but themselves. The not-even out of high school Leadership they have running their social platformsbare likely still representing these awful people. . 

|update:
Surprising that the developers or  Middle school marketing manager interns they have never addressed this Lol. 

 And what a wonderful joyful, funny, nice, and over all great people yesterday (from this Post date) that greeted me as i Joined Their Community Discord. 

I Actually had no intentions to purchase Tetris for the absurd price but let me tell you what. The Only reason I purchased (2 copies) the Tetris game that totaled almost 70 USD, was because Of the people yesterday and their keen eye to understand kindness and communication. It was just great. 

(LITERALLY played Tetris all night) 
*Fast forward* 5:09 am April 5th, 2022

I am so impressed with the great people who were so nice to me I wanted to express my sincere gratitude and love to the people who unknowingly but literally were 100% deciding factor in my decision to purchase 2 copies (one fo wife). 

Not long maybe like minutes after My post thanking the people who were so nice (I NEVER EVER WOULD OF wasted almost 70 USD on Tetris.. then A Discord community appointed Moderator Started chatting and right off the bat the man was rude he was he was inappropriate he was unprofessional and I cannot believe this game studio would allow a person like this  (the name is commando) be responsible as moderator, a person who everybody who joins Discord sees first when they join, I tell you what if that commando even uttered a single word yesterday I would have never purchased these copies of Tetris.

How can they allow someone like him Representing their game, he is the most awful person he banned Me and for what?no reason and then and then, My wife get real upset that i even bought  this tetris but then even worse, wife gets on and then they ban her. 

I want my  money back. i do not appreciate power hungry uneducated, people who cannot even hold a conversation with Another person. about the 2 hour refund policy, I don't wanna hear About this game studio ever again unless they do something about this commando and do something about what happened.   I purchased two copies of this Tetris game not because I like Tetris it's because the people yesterday were A++ super Charismatic, professional and Id hire them any day.

I screen shot the nice message i sent. In the general chat complimenting, and really expressing my outright excitement in these folks who were just amazing before the front man representing YOUR BUSINESS, YOUR PRODUCT banned me. 

My email is

kerrblur989@gmail.com

 My Discord is

kerr#2991
The joystick makes it so hard to control the pieces. You barely bump the joystick up and your piece drops

developer_response.body: Please consider filing a support ticket with us via enhance-experience.zendesk.com so we can help you more directly.

reviews.review_description: Based on the favorable reviews I was expecting a mind blowing experience. Nope. It’s tetris with simple graphics overlaid on some new agey graphics. Don’t waste your money.

I am actually good at playing Tetris but this app is impossible. I cannot control the pieces to fall where I intended and that was the slow practice setting! Based on other reviews I am clearly an outlier.

developer_response.body: What controller are you using? If you continue to have issues, please consider submitting a support ticket with us at https://enhance-experience.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/requests/new

reviews.review_description:
Let me start off by saying I’ve been a huge Tetris fan since the original Gameboy game, however I’m not biased and always give an honest opinion. Bottom line, if you’re a Tetris fan then this game is INCREDIBLE. If you’re not a fan then this game is still INCREDIBLE. It’s Tetris on acid, and you need to play this version. It’s executed perfectly but better because the music and visuals are AMAZING. Due to the memory of the Oculus however I feel like the background animations have been toned down from the PSVR version however the clarity and crispness on the Oculus I feel makes up for the toned down backgrounds. The multiplayer is very fun and while the Journey mode is fairly quick, (veterans can easily finish this mode even on expert mode on their first try) there is plenty enough in this game to keep you busy FOREVER. I will play this game forever. I love it.

I’m changing this to two stars because what good is a game if you can’t play it? Had to install an update today, mid install it stopped and said I had to free up space, so I deleted a game and then continued the install, and now it doesn’t even start. Stays on 3 dots. If I uninstall I lose all my save data? WELL WHAT ELSE AM I SUPPOSED TO DO THEN? Such a let down and a waste of time for all the playing I’ve done.

developer_response.body: Please consider contacting Oculus support as this sounds like an issue from the OS level when the game tried to update. They may be able to help!!

reviews.review_description: One of the best Tetris games I’ve played, the visuals are eye catching and mesmerizing, the animations that play are distracting but in a good way, a must have for Tetris fans!!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! We're glad to hear that you're enjoying the game.

reviews.review_description: It is very difficult for me even in "Beginner". Yea... That is definitely NOT beginner level. Considering refunding.
Not what I thought it would be … the video makes it look great but it’s not like it at all.

So in the beginning I could tell it was new agey music. First level sort of the theme was let’s all be one in the world. With sea life floating around. As you progress you get to levels called prayer circle with ritual chanting and then other very religious type levels. 

I love Tetris but I’m not wanting chanting or religious elements added to my game. 

Would like a refund ASAP and will be deleting the game. So sad.

It’s crazy to say this about a Tetris game, but truly i feel it’s a lifechanger when you experience it for yourself at the right time of your life
Beautiful melodic themes, amazing visuals and spot-on sound design coupled with everything that already made Tetris great, forms this beautiful piece of art

As everyone days, i hope they update the visuals to accomodate the Quest 2 better, it is quite crusty inside the headset, but it isn’t a deal breaker for me, hence why it has 4 stars instead of 5. If there were to be an update thought, i would gladly edit my score.

I’m adding this game to my list of must-show when touring my Quest 2 around to friends and family
I dont like the games on here. Sorry I purchased oculus. More like watching TV.  Need better games to play
They ruined Tetris.

It’s basic Tetris, BUT after the first couple of levels the repetitive taking  in another language and flashing lights are very disturbing. By the 4th or 5th level the images are no longer stars and whales but devil masks. Not cute. Not amusing. Bought as a bundle and I regret it.  Not worth it even if was free.
This game is like meditation in the best way
Most of the new songs are awful. I just want the classic Tetris theme song to play Tetris.

Easily one of the prettiest gameplay experiences I’ve ever had. The story mode is so much fun. The levels are also very well executed. The difficulty rating is fair. Challenging yet fun and the music and colors make you want to play another level. DLC would be awesome and I would buy immediately after finding out about it. Overall a great game. Takes Tetris to a new level

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! We're glad to hear that you're enjoying the game.

reviews.review_description: How to change Chinese language?

developer_response.body: In options, gameplay settings you should find a language option. It can be set to Traditional Chinese or Simplified Chinese.

reviews.review_description: The gameplay is of course solid, but the visuals and music seal the experience. Absolute 10/10
We've been tetris players since the 80s and we've played previous sequels that added polish but not much innovation. This experience is fantastic.
Seriously it’s possibly my favorite go to vr game. The music plus the effects make this a must own.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! We're glad to hear that you're enjoying the game.

reviews.review_description: This is now my favorite way to play Tetris. Music can get a little strange from time to time, but seriously great game!

It's tetris, that should probably be enough for you to decide if you want to play it or not just with those 2 words.

It's a solid version of tetris, the graphical style is great and the music is pretty cool. Unfortunately, a such a fine game is let down by the quest 2 controls. Using a stick with a 2d game is never great to be honest, but the quest sticks are just too loose or something, it always feels like I'm on the verge of not being able to move the active piece enough, or moving it too much.

So yeah, perfectly good game but probably not the most ideal way to play it.

developer_response.body: There are options in-game to adjust the stick sensitivity which may help smooth things out a bit. Thanks for the review!

reviews.review_description:
The game itself is amazing, i really like the graphic style and reinterpretation of a classic game.
The only problem is the graphics are way too bad for the Quest 2 hardware. Everything looks pixelated and unpleasant.
If the update releases, this is a 5 star game for sure.
Love this game!! For me its very challenging.

reviews.review_title: Best version of the best game
reviews.review_description: This is, hands down, the best version of one of the best games ever created. At its core, you have a solid version of Tetris with precise and responsive controls along with all the options you'd expect. Layered on top of that is a sheen of trippy transcendence - you can really lose yourself when you get into a state of flow as the lines melt around you and the pulsing beats massage your ears. This is a must-have game!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! Happy to hear that you consider us a must-have. 💕

reviews.review_description: Fun game but can be challenging at some times. Very peaceful and great music and visuals!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! We're glad to hear that you're enjoying the game.
